texto: I could never understand what was going on in my dreams I couldn’t control the happenings, it’s like I just stood there glued to the ground watching everything around me move and evolve into different scenarios. I was a ghost of myself watching life unravel before my own eyes...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a JaszCab.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I could never understand what was going on in my dreams I couldn’t control the happenings, it’s l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, dreams, watching pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
